
### thinking about testing  {.smaller}

<!-- \lstset{language=C,style=smaller} -->
 
```
void expand(char *arg) {
    if (arg[0] == '[') {
        if (arg[2] != '-' || arg[4] != ']') {
            putchar('[');
            expand(&arg[1]);
        } else {
            for (int i = arg[1]; i <= arg[3]; ++i) {
                putchar(i);
            }
            expand(&arg[5]);
        }
    } else if (arg[0] != '\0') {
        putchar(arg[0]);
        expand(&arg[1]);
    }
}

```
